title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
subTitle: Friends Gopal, Lucky, Madhav and Laxman often dupe gullible people out of their money. Hilarity ensues when they target a middle-aged couple and simultaneously try wooing their beautiful neighbour.

title: Pyar Ka Saaya
subTitle: A murdered man returns as a ghost to warn his wife of the danger she is in. However, he is able to communicate only through a fortune-teller.

title: Takkar
subTitle: Ravi Malhotra, a photographer, is framed by a corrupt policeman, D'Costa, on the day before his wedding. While in jail, Ravi studies law to exact revenge against his perpetrator.

title: The Burning Train
subTitle: Vinod, a railway engineer, launches the Super Express, a dream project that is India's fastest passenger train. However, it goes out of control on its maiden journey due to a bomb planted by a rival.

title: Jeet
subTitle: Karan, a gangster, falls in love with Kajal, but she marries Raju because of her father's poor health. Later, when Raju finds out about his father's illegal business, Karan is hired to kill him.

title: Tango Charlie
subTitle: When the war breaks out between India and Pakistan, riots erupt in North India. Later, BSF trooper Tarun and his battalion are sent to Kargil, where they face a challenge that will decide his fate.

title: Devdas
subTitle: After his wealthy family prohibits him from marrying the woman he is in love with, Devdas's life spirals downward as he takes up alcohol and a life of vice to alleviate the pain.

title: Arjun Pandit
subTitle: A mild-mannered professor's world shatters after betrayal drives him into a violent transformation, where love and rage collide on the streets of Mumbai.

title: Amar Akbar Anthony
subTitle: Three brothers, each raised in different religious households, reunite after many years in a chance encounter. They set out to take revenge on those responsible for separating them.

title: Amar Akbar Anthony
subTitle: Three brothers, each raised in different religious households, reunite after many years in a chance encounter. They set out to take revenge on those responsible for separating them.

title: Rajoo Dada
subTitle: Rajoo intends to exact revenge on his parents' killers and grows up to be a criminal. However, he needs to join hands with his brother, who is a police officer, to find the culprits.

title: Surya Putra Shani Dev
subTitle: Ravi and his wife, Leena, learn about Lord Shanidev's greatness from a village priest while en route to Mumbai. Later, Ravi and Leena's faith is tested when Ravi meets with an accident.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi
subTitle: Surinder, a mild-mannered engineer, marries Taani, the woman he loves. However, when Taani confesses that she can never truly love him back, Surinder undergoes an extreme makeover to woo her.

title: Sanam Bewafa
subTitle: Salman and Rukhsar's love brings two warring families face to face, only for tradition, dowry demands and heartbreak to test their fragile bond.

title: Hungama
subTitle: A millionaire businessman living in a village decides to move to the city with his wife. However, things take a comical turn as a case of mistaken identity causes chaos in their lives.

title: Rakshak
subTitle: ASP Raj Sinha is assigned to catch the criminal responsible for printing and circulating fake currency notes. However, he is shocked to learn that the person is none other than his childhood friend.

title: Ravan Vadh
subTitle: Ravana and Sri Ram engage in a fierce battle to the death when Sri Ram brings his army to Lanka in a bid to save a kidnapped Sita.

title: Ram Jaane
subTitle: Ram Jaane, an orphan, grows up to be a criminal. His social worker friend tries to reform him but Ram is keener to win over his childhood love, Bela, than turning over a new leaf.

title: Ram Jaane
subTitle: Ram Jaane, an orphan, grows up to be a criminal. His social worker friend tries to reform him but Ram is keener to win over his childhood love, Bela, than turning over a new leaf.

title: Dharam Adhikari
subTitle: Dharamraj, a righteous man, manages his village's affairs justly, making him well-liked among the people. Irked by his popularity, a jealous Chaudhary and Shastri conspire to get rid of him.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Dream Girl
subTitle: A young woman, conning people to run an orphanage, falls in love with a rich man under the disguise of a princess. However, their romance crumbles when her truth comes out.

title: Jai Kuldevi Maa
subTitle: Rajal and her husband are unable to conceive a baby and pray to get their wish granted. Soon, a goddess appears and offers a solution and they are blessed with a daughter, Sonal.

title: Damini
subTitle: Damini witnesses her housemaid being raped by her brother-in-law and his friends. Despite facing many obstacles, she strives to get justice for her with the help of her husband and Govind, a lawyer.

title: Mehndi
subTitle: Newly-wed Pooja is left shocked when her in-laws and her husband start ill-treating her. Unable to bear the mistreatment, she decides to teach them a lesson.

title: Stree
subTitle: In the eerie townscape of Chanderi, dressmaker Vicky falls for a mysterious woman with a supernatural aura. His heart sinks at the possibility that she might be Stree, the resentful man-hunter.

title: Jai Dakshineshwar Kali Maa
subTitle: A young woman is harassed and tormented by her mother-in-law. She is rescued from her predicament by the Goddess Kali who is pleased with her ardent devotion.

title: Mardaani
subTitle: After child traffickers kidnap a beloved teenager, a Mumbai policewoman embarks on a personal mission to bring the vile perpetrators to justice.
